ns0:entry.ns0:title: ImageMagick/ImageMagick
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick
Language: c
ImageMagick is a free, open-source software suite for creating, editing, converting, and displaying images. It supports 200+ formats and offers powerful command-line tools and APIs for automation, scripting, and integration across platforms.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
Language: c
An open source, portable, easy to use, readable and flexible TLS library, and reference implementation of the PSA Cryptography API. Releases are on a varying cadence, typically around 3 - 6 months between releases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/cuda-samples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/cuda-samples
Language: c
Samples for CUDA Developers which demonstrates features in CUDA Toolkit

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RT-Thread/rt-thread
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RT-Thread/rt-thread
Language: c
RT-Thread is an open source IoT Real-Time Operating System (RTOS). https://rt-thread.github.io/rt-thread/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Vatuu/silent-hill-decomp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Vatuu/silent-hill-decomp
Language: c
An in-progress decompilation of the 1.1 US release of Silent Hill on the Playstation 1.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: curl/curl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/curl/curl
Language: c
A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTMP, RTMPS, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: duixcom/Duix-Avatar
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/duixcom/Duix-Avatar
Language: c
🚀 Truly open-source AI avatar(digital human) toolkit for offline video generation and digital human cloning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: espeak-ng/espeak-ng
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/espeak-ng/espeak-ng
Language: c
eSpeak NG is an open source speech synthesizer that supports more than hundred languages and accents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: espressif/esp-idf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/espressif/esp-idf
Language: c
Espressif IoT Development Framework. Official development framework for Espressif SoCs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebook/zstd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/zstd
Language: c
Zstandard - Fast real-time compression algorithm

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hathach/tinyusb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hathach/tinyusb
Language: c
An open source cross-platform USB stack for embedded system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: immortalwrt/immortalwrt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/immortalwrt/immortalwrt
Language: c
An opensource OpenWrt variant for mainland China users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: karpathy/llama2.c
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/karpathy/llama2.c
Language: c
Inference Llama 2 in one file of pure C

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kingToolbox/WindTerm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kingToolbox/WindTerm
Language: c
A professional cross-platform SSH/Sftp/Shell/Telnet/Tmux/Serial terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lvgl/lvgl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lvgl/lvgl
Language: c
Embedded graphics library to create beautiful UIs for any MCU, MPU and display type.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mimalloc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mimalloc
Language: c
mimalloc is a compact general purpose allocator with excellent performance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moonshine-ai/moonshine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moonshine-ai/moonshine
Language: c
Fast and accurate automatic speech recognition (ASR) for edge devices

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openzfs/zfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openzfs/zfs
Language: c
OpenZFS on Linux and FreeBSD

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sonic-net/sonic-buildimage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sonic-net/sonic-buildimage
Language: c
Scripts which perform an installable binary image build for SONiC

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sqlcipher/sqlcipher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sqlcipher/sqlcipher
Language: c
SQLCipher is a standalone fork of SQLite that adds 256 bit AES encryption of database files and other security features.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tianocore/edk2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tianocore/edk2
Language: c
EDK II

ns0:entry.ns0:title: valkey-io/valkey
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey
Language: c
A flexible distributed key-value database that is optimized for caching and other realtime workloads.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
Language: c
Primary Git Repository for the Zephyr Project. Zephyr is a new generation, scalable, optimized, secure RTOS for multiple hardware architectures.
